design_system.name: The Electric Fortress
design_system.description: A high-contrast, futuristic Web3 security aesthetic that combines Swiss precision with Cyberpunk energy. It prioritizes trust, clarity, and vigilance.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00FF94] text-black hover:bg-[#00CC76] font-bold rounded-md px-8 py-3 transition-all hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,255,148,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#333] text-white hover:border-[#00FF94] hover:text-[#00FF94] rounded-md px-8 py-3 transition-all
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF3B30]/10 border border-[#FF3B30]/50 text-[#FF3B30] hover:bg-[#FF3B30] hover:text-white rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-all

cards.glass: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-lg p-6 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300
cards.grid: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#222] p-6 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#333] transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#222] text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:border-[#00FF94] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00FF94] rounded-md h-12 px-4 transition-all

badges.safe: bg-[#00FF94]/10 text-[#00FF94] border border-[#00FF94]/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
badges.risk: bg-[#FF3B30]/10 text-[#FF3B30] border border-[#FF3B30]/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
badges.neutral: bg-zinc-800/50 text-zinc-400 border border-zinc-700/50 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

landing_page.hero_section: min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-center relative overflow-hidden

dashboard.sidebar: hidden md:flex flex-col w-64 border-r border-[#222] bg-[#050505] h-screen sticky top-0

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Use framer-motion to animate a gradient border around active cards.
visual_enhancers.scan_line: A horizontal line scanning up and down on the 'Scanner' page (bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-[#00FF94] to-transparent opacity-50).
visual_enhancers.noise_overlay: fixed inset-0 z-50 pointer-events-none opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

hero_background.alt: Abstract geometric blockchain network with blue lighting

feature_infrastructure.alt: Server room rack with blue lights

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a high-trust, high-tech security platform. Do not make it look like a toy. Use the 'Electric Fortress' theme. Prioritize dark mode, high contrast, and clear data visualization.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout: Avoid centering everything. Use the 'Tetris' grid for marketing and 'High Density' grid for the dashboard. Use 'Grid Borders' to separate sections.
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Use Shadcn UI components but override the styles with the 'Electric Fortress' theme. Do not use default Shadcn cards; use the 'Glass' or 'Grid' card styles defined above.
instructions_to_main_agent.charts: Use Recharts. Style the tooltips to be glassmorphic. Use the primary (Green) and danger (Red) colors for data series.
instructions_to_main_agent.animations: Add micro-interactions to every button and card. Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and the 'Tracing Beam' effect.
instructions_to_main_agent.accessibility: Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against the dark background. Use 'aria-label' for all icon buttons.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in `/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx`
